etimesWho is Kyle Long? The Ohio man charged with wife’s murder after claiming she stabbed herself 17 times – what to know about the caseA husband in London, Ohio, faces murder charges. Two candidates named Akanksha Singh are claiming the same rank, 301. One claimant is from Bihar, the granddaughter of Brahmeshwar Singh.
